message:
fix: remove dead code and use os.UserHomeDir()

- Remove unused captureMu, captureCache, captureCacheKey,
  captureCacheEntry from tmux/client.go (dead code)
- Remove unused AgentCommandConfig struct from session/restore.go
- Replace exec.Command("bash", "-c", "echo $HOME") with
  os.UserHomeDir() in session/capture.go for better efficiency
  and cross-platform compatibility
